message:
feat(planner): expand expression codegen to cover binary/unary ops, CAST, CASE, IS NULL, and function calls

Extend the planner's emit_expr to handle the full range of SQL
expressions beyond literals and bind parameters:

- Binary operations: arithmetic (+, -, *, /, %), comparison (=, !=, <,
  >, <=, >=, IS, IS NOT), logical (AND, OR), bitwise (&, |, <<, >>),
  and string concatenation (||).
- Unary operations: negate, plus (no-op), NOT, and bit-NOT (~).
- IS [NOT] NULL with proper 1/0 result register pattern.
- CAST(expr AS type) via Affinity opcode with type-name-to-affinity
  mapping.
- Scalar function calls with PureFunc opcode emission.
- CASE WHEN ... THEN ... ELSE ... END (both searched and simple forms).
- COLLATE passthrough.
- CURRENT_TIME/DATE/TIMESTAMP now emit PureFunc calls to time/date/
  datetime('now') instead of NULL placeholders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
